steps.description: Type text: "contact exporter" into the search/filter input field within the "Samples" tab of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code, to filter available sample projects.

Click the blue "Create" button in the "Contact Exporter using Graph Toolkit" sample row within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface in Visual Studio Code.Add ${{var:app_name:graph-toolkit-contact-exporter}} in to env.
Click the "aad.manifest.json" file in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to open it for editing.
Click the "aad.manifest.json" file tab in the editor area of Visual Studio Code to activate or focus the manifest file for the GRAPH-TOOLKIT-CONTACT-EXPORTER project.
Click the "Continue" button in the confirmation dialog for converting the Microsoft Entra app manifest file to a new schema within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Close (Ctrl+W)" button on the tab for `aad.manifest.json` in the Visual Studio Code editor.

parameters.sample:
File content replaced.

✓ Script executed successfully

steps.description: @assertion there's notification "Your Microsoft Entra app manifest is outdated".
Click the "Upgrade" button in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit notification to update the Microsoft Entra app manifest in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Continue" button in the confirmation dialog titled “Converting Microsoft Entra app manifest file to new schema will replace the original file. Do you still want to continue?” within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Use the keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Shift+P to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code while working within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface.
Type text "upgrade microsoft entra" into the Visual Studio Code command palette input field at the top-center of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface.
Press the Enter key to execute the "Upgrade Microsoft Entra Manifest to New Schema" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Press the Enter key to select the "aad.manifest.json" file in the "Select Microsoft Entra manifest.json file" dialog within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "MICROSOFT 365 AGENTS TOOLKIT" sidebar icon in the Visual Studio Code interface to open the toolkit panel.
Click the "aad.manifest.json" file in the Explorer panel of Visual Studio Code to open the Microsoft Entra app manifest.
@assertion there hasn't "Convent to New Schema" exist.
